infrastructure.details: Best laboratories with free access to students, including a separate digital library with 60 computers connected to the internet at fast speeds.
Includes Tennis, Shuttle, and Badminton Courts.
Part of the Health Centre, provides a venue for bodybuilders and students to keep their general health in check.
PSG hospital available to care for emergency conditions.
~Provides food and beverages for students and staff.
Best laboratories with free access to students, preparing them with the latest method of learning industrial practices.

Contains 2.47 lakh volumes, 12574 CDs/DVDs, 240 printed journals, and access to over 9000 online electronic journals. Deploys PSG-ILMS, an integrated library management system. Includes a separate digital library with 60 computers.
~Venue for events, seminars, and cultural activities.
Provides a venue for bodybuilders and students who want to keep their general health in check, offering necessary facilities.
Includes first aid boxes in various corners of the campus and access to PSG hospital for emergency conditions.

Offers textbooks with a 10% discount, workshop outfits with tailoring capabilities, shoes, stationery items (mini-drafter, drawing equipment), and lamination facilities. Open Monday-Friday 2:30 PM-5:30 PM, Saturday 8:30 AM-1 PM.

about:
## 
THE PSG TALE

PSG Polytechnic College, established in the year 1939, a pioneer institute in the field of Technical Education and Research is a Government aided, ISO 9001 certified institution with Autonomous status from 1976. This aids it to have a flexible curriculum and updated syllabi. The Polytechnic College has the best laboratories with free access to the students and prepares them with the latest method of learning industrial practices.

MISSION

Mission of an Institution is to:

Provide application oriented technical education, Foster skill Development Evolve innovative applications of Technology Encourage Career advancement and Entrepreneurship
Ultimately mould young men and women capable of disseminating the technical knowledge for the betterment of the Society.

**

**82 Years of

Education Excellence



VISION

Our Vision of an Institution is to:

PSG Polytechnic College aspires to be recognized as one of the leaders in the development of technical education and application of the knowledge and skills for the benefit of the society.

QUALITY POLICY

We at PSG Polytechnic College endeavor to achieve customer satisfaction by providing Quality Education through Faculty Development, Update of Facilities and Continual Improvement

*[Image: card]*

Industrial visit Glasgow Caledonian University | Scotland, UK

DEPARTMENTWISE TOPPERS
